name: BM Technologies, Inc.
summary: BM Technologies, Inc., through its fintech banking platform, provides digital banking and disbursement services to consumers and students in the United States. It facilitates deposits and banking products and services between customers and FDIC-insured partner banks. The company provides access to a suite of banking products, including checking, savings, personal loans, credit cards, and student refinancing. Its digital banking platform includes cloud-based technology, proprietary onboarding screening, processing, and account servicing. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Wayne, Pennsylvania. BM Technologies, Inc. was formerly a subsidiary of Customers Bank (Phoenixville, Pennsylvania).
